text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo's performance left a strong impression on me, but...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Halo! You ran really well at the tryouts! I might be one of the newer
trainers, but we'd make a great team!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Rejected. A self-admitted inexperienced trainer like yourself wouldn't
benefit me. Go ask someone else.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
King Halo, I loved the way you ran! How about joining me? I can help
you be as successful as your mother!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Rejected. I don't bask in past glory, least of all hers. Is her history all
you're capable of seeing? You're unfit for me too.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... None of you are good enough. Please stop wasting my time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Scouting King Halo seems next to impossible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my head full of worries, I head off to the cafeteria to grab some
food.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Are you still thinking about that stuck-up princess? Sure, she might've
inherited a bit of talent, but I wouldn't touch that personality with a
ten-foot pole.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Her pride outweighs her skill. Placing 2nd in the tryouts doesn't mean
she'll be able to stand her ground in the Classics.
choice_data_list:
No, I'm positive she's got what it takes for the
big races.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
...Well, if you say so. Don't say I didn't warn you though. Oh, speak of
the devil.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, King, I heard all about it. You turned down every single trainer?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph, sadly no one is befitting of a first-rate racer like me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, you're picky as always.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I've got good news for you! Drum roll, please... Congratulations!
You've been invited to participate in the upcoming scrimmage! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be a great chance to draw lots of attention. Tons of trainers
are gonna be there. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Wait a second. I'm pretty sure you got invited to it, not me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, don't think too much about it. Don't you wanna race
again?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, you're right. Count me in.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to show off my skills to everyone and find the perfect
trainer for me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All right! Looks like I'll be able to skip the race then. Thanks, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Skip?! Wait a second, Sky! Gosh, why do you always do this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to find a trainer that meets her standards, King Halo resolves
to participate in the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But why are her standards so high?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew. Hah... hah... phew. Let's see my time... Hmm, not bad.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh... it's you again.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, if you're here to scout me again, my answer is still the same. I'm
not going to accept anyone less than first-rate—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz... Bzzz...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, who is it now?! I swear, people always pick the worst time to
call!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...It's Mother.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It doesn't matter. I already know what she's going to say.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"Have you found a trainer? No? See, I told you. Give up and come
back home already."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I wish she would stop thinking she knows better than me! Just
because she won a few G1 races in the past doesn't give her the right
to decide my future!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
When I told her I wanted to race, she completely blew up and refused
to hear me out!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
She kept saying things like, "The racing world isn't for the weak." and
"Don't follow in my footsteps."
choice_data_list: Maybe she's just worried about her daughter?
Maybe she's just worried about her daughter?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Worried? ...Heh, as if.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
She's never paid attention to me. Not while she was still a racer, nor
when she left the track and started working. And now she wants to
play the role of a worried mother?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
She'd insist that I have no talent, that I should give up and find
something else that'll make me happy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: My happiness? My talent? Who is she to judge?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The only person who gets to decide what I do with my life is me!
That's why I'm never going to give up, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win and prove to her that I have the talent. I won't stop
until she acknowledges that I'm also first-rate!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's right. No matter how many times I fall, or how many people
laugh at me, I'll make sure everyone knows my name.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It doesn't matter muddied I become. My head will always be held high. I will never back down.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I don't care what other people say or think of me. I am King Halo, the
first-rate racer, and victory will be mine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The determination in her voice is almost palpable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though people may find her ambitions lofty and her self-proclaimed
"first-rate" title laughable, it's a testament to her commitment.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why I won't compromise when it comes to finding a trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If the trainer doesn't have the same level of commitment as I do,
they'll never be able to truly support me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I think I've spoken enough. It's time for me to continue training.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: If you don't mind, I'll be taking my leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo turns on her heel and walks away. As I watch her shrink into
the distance, the word "commitment" rings in my ears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, rain begins to pour down incessantly, lasting through the night.
